coin_profile.name: Bitcoin
coin_profile.description: Bitcoin is the original decentralised digital currency and the world's largest cryptocurrency by market cap. It operates on a proof-of-work blockchain with a fixed supply of 21 million coins, making it a programmatically scarce store of value. Often referred to as 'digital gold', Bitcoin is primarily used as a long-term store of value and hedge against inflation.

BTC.name: Bitcoin

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 7.3/10 and survivability 86.7%. Base: 10.0% p.a., Bull: 17.0% p.a., Bear: -12.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket B (Store of Value): Valued on scarcity and monetary premium. M6 Monetary Premium measures share of gold market cap captured. M8 Production Cost provides a PoW mining-cost floor (×2 premium). M10 Supply-adj penalises tokens with significant unlocked supply. M+ NVT (SoV) treats volume as monetary circulation velocity. M+ Peer Value anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

BTC.iv_method: M6 Monetary premium, M8 Production cost, M+ NVT, M+ Peer value

bull_points: Has captured 6.7% of gold's market cap — significant monetary adoption as a store of value
Full gold parity would imply a price of $1,049,840 — 1384% above current price
Trading at 2.0x estimated production cost — a healthy premium that incentivises miners without being excessive
bear_points: Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets
Regulatory uncertainty across major markets presents an ongoing risk
Competition from newer protocols could erode Bitcoin's market position over time

cost_of_production.note: Production cost is an industry estimate, not an exact figure

coin_profile.name: BNB
coin_profile.description: BNB is the native token of the BNB Chain (formerly Binance Smart Chain) and the Binance exchange ecosystem. It offers reduced trading fees on Binance, powers the BNB Chain network, and undergoes quarterly token burns. BNB benefits from Binance's position as the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange.

BNB.name: BNB

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 6.3/10 and survivability 70.0%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -21.1% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. M1 DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. M2 P/S compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. M3 P/E uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. M+ NVT treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. M+ Peer Value anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. M+ Dilution-adj penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods that produce values outside 0.1x–8x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

BNB.iv_method: M+ NVT, M+ Peer value, M+ Dilution-adj

bear_points: Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets

coin_profile.name: Bitcoin Cash
coin_profile.description: Bitcoin Cash is a Bitcoin fork created in 2017 to increase block size and enable cheaper on-chain payments. It prioritises low-fee peer-to-peer transactions over store of value.

BCH.name: Bitcoin Cash
